user.title: Connect to Fuel Finder
user.description: Enter the credentials from your Fuel Finder developer account.

data_description.client_id: Found in your Fuel Finder developer portal under API credentials.
data_description.client_secret: The secret associated with your client ID.

search.title: Find fuel stations
search.description: Search by postcode, city, or station name to find stations to monitor.

data_description.search_query: For example: SW1A 1AA, London, or Shell.

select_stations.title: Select stations
select_stations.description: Choose which stations you want to track fuel prices for.

select_fuel_types.title: Select fuel types
select_fuel_types.description: Choose which fuel types you want to track. Only selected types will create sensors.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate
reauth_confirm.description: Your credentials are no longer valid. Please enter new credentials.

data_description.client_id: Found in your Fuel Finder developer portal under API credentials.
data_description.client_secret: The secret associated with your client ID.

reconfigure_search.title: Find fuel stations
reconfigure_search.description: Search by postcode, city, or station name to find stations to add.

data_description.search_query: For example: SW1A 1AA, London, or Shell.

reconfigure_select.title: Select stations
reconfigure_select.description: Choose which stations you want to track fuel prices for.

reconfigure_fuel_types.title: Select fuel types
reconfigure_fuel_types.description: Choose which fuel types you want to track. Only selected types will create sensors.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the Fuel Finder API. Please check your network connection and try again.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid client ID or secret. Please verify your credentials at the Fuel Finder developer portal.
error.rate_limited: Too many requests to the Fuel Finder API. Please wait a few minutes and try again.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Check the Home Assistant logs for details.
error.no_stations_found: No stations found matching your search. Try a different postcode, city, or station name.
error.no_stations_selected: Please select at least one station.
error.no_fuel_types_selected: Please select at least one fuel type.

abort.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the Fuel Finder API. Please check your credentials and try again.
